item.title: All Supreme Court and High Courts related matters
item.description: We deal with all kind of matters before the Honourable High Courts and the Honourable Supreme Court.

item.title: Supreme Court Judgments
item.description: Recent judgments by the Honourable Supreme Court of India.

item.title: Criminal Matters
item.description: FIR matters, bail, anticipatory bail, trials, discharge, quashing petitions, revisions, appeals, and related proceedings.

item.title: Constitutional Cases
item.description: Information related to Constitutional Cases.

item.title: Delhi High Court Judgments
item.description: Recent judgments by the Honourable Delhi High Court.

item.title: Property Disputes
item.description: Title, partition, possession, injunction, mutation, encroachment, tenancy, and property disputes.

item.title: Allahabad High Court Judgments
item.description: Recent judgments by the Honourable Allahabad High Court.

item.title: Special Leave Petition (SLP)
item.description: Information related to Special Leave Petition (SLP).

item.title: Wills, Succession and Estate Matters
item.description: Wills, succession, succession certificates, inheritance disputes, and estate documentation.

item.title: Bombay High Court Judgments
item.description: Recent judgments by the Honourable Bombay High Court.

item.title: Civil, Criminals Appeals, and Revisions
item.description: We have a fine team of best lawyers for criminal matters and criminal trails.

item.title: Matrimonial and Family Disputes
item.description: Divorce, maintenance, child custody, domestic violence, dowry matters, settlements, and family court proceedings.

item.title: Court Marriages and Legal Formalities
item.description: Court marriage, marriage registration, documentation, affidavits, and related legal formalities.

item.title: Public Interest Litigations (PIL)
item.description: Representative litigation for protecting the rights of those, who are still bound by limitations.

item.title: Uttarakhand High Court Judgments
item.description: Recent judgments by the Honourable Uttarakhand High Court.

item.title: Madhya Pradesh High Court Judgments
item.description: Recent judgments by the Honourable Madhya Pradesh High Court.

item.title: Service and Employment Matters
item.description: Termination, suspension, departmental enquiries, promotion, seniority, transfer, service benefits, pensionary claims, recruitment disputes, and writ petitions.

item.title: Consumer Protection and Consumer Cases
item.description: Defective products, deficient services, refund claims, insurance disputes, banking disputes, real estate complaints, e-commerce disputes, and consumer cases.

item.title: Rajasthan High Court Judgments
item.description: Recent judgments by the Honourable Rajasthan High Court.

item.title: Company, Commercial and Tender Matters
item.description: Company disputes, commercial claims, contract enforcement, tender challenges, blacklisting, recovery matters, arbitration, and business disputes.

item.title: GST, Income Tax and Taxation Matters
item.description: GST, income tax, notices, assessment orders, appeals, recovery proceedings, demand disputes, refund claims, penalties, and tax litigation.

item.title: All Supreme Court and High Court Matters
item.description: Writ petitions, appeals, revisions, special leave petitions, constitutional remedies, and litigation before High Courts and the Supreme Court.

item.title: Public Interest Litigation (PIL)
item.description: Public rights, civic grievances, environmental issues, illegal encroachments, administrative inaction, public welfare, and constitutional remedies.

item.title: Legal Opinion and Drafting
item.description: Legal opinions, notices, replies, representations, agreements, affidavits, petitions, applications, pleadings, contracts, and legal documents.
